hero.title: Stop losing patients between one <highlight>conversation and the next</highlight> on WhatsApp.
hero.subtitle: ZapBlast brings together CRM, a patient funnel, and WhatsApp campaigns at scale in a single platform — built for aesthetic, health, and dental clinics that want to grow with predictability.

problemSolution.title: Your clinic delivers great care. The problem is what happens <highlight>before and after</highlight> the appointment.
problemSolution.subtitle: That is where revenue slips away — and it is exactly what ZapBlast organizes for you.

problems.followUp: Patients disappear after the first conversation and no one follows up.
problems.manual: Manual tracking in spreadsheets and notebooks — leads go cold.
problems.visibility: Zero visibility: you have no idea how many leads turned into appointments.
problems.campaigns: WhatsApp campaigns sent on the fly, with no templates and no control.

solutions.funnel: A patient funnel that shows exactly who needs a follow-up today.
solutions.reminders: Automated reminders and messages to re-engage anyone who went quiet.
solutions.dashboard: A dashboard with conversion by stage, no-show rate, and revenue per procedure.
solutions.blast: Bulk messaging with Meta-approved templates and the unofficial channel.

features.title: Everything your clinic needs, without one more open tab
features.subtitle: From the first message to post-procedure — a single platform to capture, convert, and retain patients.

whatsappBlast.title: Bulk WhatsApp messaging
whatsappBlast.description: Send campaigns to thousands of patients using Meta-approved templates (official API) or the unofficial channel — respecting the 24-hour window and opt-in rules.

crm.title: Patient CRM with a Kanban funnel
crm.description: Drag each lead through the stages — from intake to procedure. Nothing slips through, and your team knows exactly who to work first.

scheduling.title: Automated scheduling and reminders
scheduling.description: Schedule procedures and fire automated WhatsApp reminders to cut no-shows and keep the calendar full.

dashboard.title: Campaign metrics dashboard
dashboard.description: Track conversion by stage, no-show rate, time to schedule, and the performance of every campaign in one place.

socialProof.title: Clinics that will grow with ZapBlast
socialProof.subtitle: We are selecting the first clinics from the waitlist. Real stories coming here soon.

aesthetics.quote: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. The patients who used to vanish are responding again, and the calendar stopped having gaps.

dental.quote: Sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore. We finally see the conversion at each funnel stage and where we were losing leads.

health.quote: Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud exercitation. Our WhatsApp campaigns stopped being improvised and became a predictable routine.

preRegister.pitchDescription: Leave your details and be one of the first clinics to organize the patient funnel and send WhatsApp campaigns at scale.
preRegister.privacyNote: No commitment. We use your details only for the invitation.
preRegister.successToast: You are on the list! We will be in touch soon.

footer.tagline: CRM and WhatsApp marketing for clinics.

body.p1: This Privacy Policy describes how {controller} (“ZapBlast”, “we”) collects, uses, shares, and protects the personal data processed through the ZapBlast platform — a CRM for clinics that also sends WhatsApp campaigns at scale. It applies to client clinics, their teams, and the contacts (leads and patients) whose data is processed on the platform.
body.p2: Data processing complies with the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (Law No. 13.709/2018 — “LGPD”). By using the platform, you acknowledge that you are aware of the practices described here.

dataCollected.title: 2. Data we collect
dataCollected.intro: We process the following categories of personal data and their purposes:

items.identity: Identification and contact data (name, phone/WhatsApp number, email) — to identify the contact and enable communication.
items.account: Clinic account data (registration details and the user team credentials) — for authentication and platform operation.
items.journey: Patient journey data (funnel stage, appointments, procedures) — to manage and optimize care.
items.campaigns: Campaign and message data (content sent, delivery status, and interactions) — to operate, measure, and optimize WhatsApp campaigns.

dataUse.title: 3. How we use the data
dataUse.intro: We use personal data for the following purposes:

items.crm: Operate the CRM and track the journey of leads and patients.
items.dispatch: Send WhatsApp campaigns — including through the official WhatsApp API (WhatsApp Cloud API) provided by Meta — respecting opt-in rules, approved message templates, and the 24-hour customer-service window where applicable.
items.metrics: Generate performance metrics and reports by stage and by campaign.
items.support: Provide support, ensure security, and comply with legal obligations.

sharing.title: 4. Sharing with third parties
sharing.intro: We do not sell personal data. We share data only to the extent necessary to operate the platform, notably with:

items.meta: Meta / WhatsApp — to send messages through the official WhatsApp API (WhatsApp Business Platform), the data required for sending is processed by Meta as a processor/recipient. Meta's processing is governed by the platform's own terms and privacy policies.
items.infra: Infrastructure providers (hosting and related services) strictly to enable the platform to function.
items.authorities: Authorities, when required by law or court order.

retention.title: 5. Data retention
retention.body: We keep personal data only for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Policy, for the duration of the relationship with the client clinic, and for the periods required by legal or regulatory obligations. Once the applicable purposes and periods have ended, the data is securely deleted or anonymized.

rights.title: 6. Your rights (LGPD)
rights.intro: Under the LGPD, the data subject may, at any time, exercise the following rights:

items.access: Access — confirm the existence of processing and access your data.
items.correction: Correction — correct incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data.
items.deletion: Deletion — request the erasure of your personal data.
items.portability: Portability — request the portability of your data to another provider.
items.revocation: Consent withdrawal — withdraw, at any time, consent previously given.

deletion.title: 7. Data deletion
deletion.intro: To request the deletion of your personal data, follow the steps below:

steps.send: Send a message to <link>{channel}</link> with the subject “Data deletion”.
steps.identify: Provide the full name and the phone/WhatsApp number associated with the data so we can locate it.
steps.confirm: We will confirm receipt and complete the deletion within {timeframe}, except where retention is required by law.

controller.title: 8. Data controller and contact
controller.body: The data controller is {controller}. For questions about this Policy or to exercise your rights, contact us by email at <link>{email}</link>.

meta.homeTitle: ZapBlast — CRM & WhatsApp marketing for clinics
meta.homeDescription: Stop losing patients. ZapBlast combines CRM, a Kanban funnel, scheduling, and WhatsApp campaigns at scale for aesthetic, health, and dental clinics. Join the waitlist.
meta.privacyDescription: ZapBlast’s Privacy Policy — how we collect, use, share, and protect personal data, and how you can request deletion of your data.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters.
